narrative:
Ney Village (precinct in Defiance County) has 211 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
